text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: 01 = Independent pharmacy, defined as one to three pharmacies under common ownership. 

02 = Chain pharmacy, defined as part of a group of four or more pharmacies under common 
ownership. Pharmacies may or may not share the same Federal Tax ID number. 

05 = Franchise pharmacy, defined as an independently owned pharmacy that has signed a franchise 
agreement with a franchisor wherein the franchisee receives services such as training,
